name: opencode-agents-sidebar
description: OpenCode TUI sidebar plugin for OhMyOpenAgent agents -- lifecycle categories, collapsible sections, model display
author: mark <i@mark1708.ru>

scripts.build: bun build src/render.ts --outfile dist/tui.js --target bun --format esm --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/sdk --external @opentui/core --external @opentui/solid --external solid-js
scripts.build:index: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target bun --format esm --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/sdk
scripts.build:all: bun run clean && bun run build:types && bun run build:index && bun run build
